CustomObject.description: Configuration-driven thresholds and settings for loan products. Controls credit eligibility, LTV limits, and DPD bucketing.
CustomObject.label: Loan Configuration

fields.label: Minimum Credit Score
fields.description: Minimum CIBIL credit score required for loan eligibility.

fields.label: Maximum LTV Ratio (%)
fields.description: Maximum Loan-to-Value ratio allowed for secured loan products.

fields.label: DPD Bucket 1 (Days)
fields.description: Upper limit (days) for DPD Bucket 1 — early delinquency.

fields.label: DPD Bucket 2 (Days)
fields.description: Upper limit (days) for DPD Bucket 2 — moderate delinquency.

fields.label: DPD Bucket 3 (Days)
fields.description: Upper limit (days) for DPD Bucket 3 — severe delinquency / NPA threshold.

fields.label: Maximum Loan Amount
fields.description: Maximum sanctioned loan amount allowed for this product type.

fields.label: Processing Fee (%)
fields.description: Processing fee percentage to be charged on loan amount.

fields.label: Product Type
fields.description: Loan product type this configuration applies to (e.g., Home Loan, Personal Loan).
